name: Dom
paragraphs: Dom's background is in strategy, content, and creative direction. He's helped organizations of all sizes figure out what they're saying, who they're saying it to, and how to structure information so that people can actually find and use it.

He's spent significant time inside organizations going through digital transitions — which means he understands how to work with internal teams, stakeholders, and leadership, not just design clients. He knows how decisions get made inside institutions, and how to navigate that without slowing the project down.
